jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Thyrocare - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Doctor looking for your next big career move? Thyrocare in Visakhapatnam offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Thyrocare:
Thyrocare is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Patient Care

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Thyrocare!
